name: Salad Transcription API Data Structures
description: Core data structure documentation for the Salad Transcription API.

structures.name: TranscriptionRequest
structures.description: Request body for submitting a media file for transcription.

fields.name: input
fields.description: Input configuration for the transcription job.

children.name: url
children.description: URL of audio/video file. Must be publicly accessible (no YouTube/Drive).

children.name: language_code
children.description: BCP-47 language code. Defaults to 'en'. 97 languages supported.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: User-defined metadata attached to the job.

structures.name: TranscriptionJob
structures.description: Job object returned when submitting a transcription request.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Job status: pending | created | running | succeeded | failed.

structures.name: TranscriptionOutput
structures.description: The transcription result returned when a job succeeds.

fields.name: segments
fields.description: Array of transcribed text segments with timing.

fields.name: word_segments
fields.description: Flat array of individual word timings.

structures.name: TranscriptSegment
structures.description: A single segment of transcribed speech.

fields.name: speaker
fields.description: Speaker label (e.g., SPEAKER_00) when diarization is enabled.
